name: design-a-generalized-solana-hermes-20260409-2241
idea: Design a generalized Solana-first payment ledger and payment service for the Discord bot, reusable by ArcCompute microgrants and future payout flows. Requirements: no double payments under crashes/retries/restarts; strong table and secret security boundaries; provider-based architecture starting with SOL only; variable source wallets selected by stable wallet key; optional test payment flow before final payout; Discord-mediated recipient confirmation by replying yes; safe status machine and recovery logic; grants flow should plug into the new system as a producer instead of sending SOL directly.
